title: Phragmanthera lapathifolia
taxonomy: Phragmanthera lapathifolia is a species of plant in the family Loranthaceae. It belongs to the order Santalales and the class Magnoliopsida. The family Loranthaceae is a group of flowering plants known as mistletoes, and Phragmanthera lapathifolia is one of the species within this family. The classification of Phragmanthera lapathifolia reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants. This classification helps scientists understand the diversity and complexity of plant life.
